alt_id:Bring Forward|MenuItem|[Unnamed]/.name: Bring Forward
alt_id:Bring Forward|MenuItem|[Unnamed]/.full_description: Bring the selected object forward one level so that it's hidden behind fewer objects.

alt_id:Bring to Front|MenuItem|[Unnamed].name: Bring to Front
alt_id:Bring to Front|MenuItem|[Unnamed].full_description: Bring the selected object in front of all other objects.

alt_id:Send Backward|MenuItem|[Unnamed]/.name: Send Backward
alt_id:Send Backward|MenuItem|[Unnamed]/.full_description: Send the selected object back one level so that it's hidden behind more objects.

alt_id:Send to Back|MenuItem|[Unnamed]/[.name: Send to Back
alt_id:Send to Back|MenuItem|[Unnamed]/[.full_description: Send the selected object behind all other objects.

alt_id:Trace Error|MenuItem|[Unnamed]/[U.name: Trace Error
alt_id:Trace Error|MenuItem|[Unnamed]/[U.full_description: Show arrows that indicate which cells affect the error value of the currently selected cell. Use Ctrl+[ to navigate to precedents of the selected cell.

alt_id:Circular References|MenuItem|[Unn.name: Circular References
alt_id:Circular References|MenuItem|[Unn.full_description: Lists the first cell in your worksheet containing a circular reference.

alt_id:Data Validation...|MenuItem|[Unna.name: Data Validation...
alt_id:Data Validation...|MenuItem|[Unna.full_description:
Pick from a list of rules to limit the type of data that can be entered in a cell.

For example, you can provide a list of values, like 1, 2, and 3, or only allow numbers greater than 1000 as valid entries.

alt_id:Show Auto-Highlight|MenuItem|[Unn.name: Show Auto-Highlight
alt_id:Show Auto-Highlight|MenuItem|[Unn.full_description: Automatically uses Focus Cell in Find and Replace and other scenarios.

alt_id:Freeze First Column|ListItem|[Unn.name: Freeze First Column
alt_id:Freeze First Column|ListItem|[Unn.full_description: Keep the first column visible while scrolling through the rest of the worksheet.

alt_id:Freeze Top Row|ListItem|[Unnamed].name: Freeze Top Row
alt_id:Freeze Top Row|ListItem|[Unnamed].full_description: Keep the top row visible while scrolling through the rest of the worksheet.

alt_id:Freeze Panes|ListItem|[Unnamed]/F.name: Freeze Panes
alt_id:Freeze Panes|ListItem|[Unnamed]/F.full_description: Keep rows and columns visible while the rest of the worksheet scrolls (based on current selection).

alt_id:Use Relative References|MenuItem|.name: Use Relative References
alt_id:Use Relative References|MenuItem|.full_description:
Use relative references so that macros are recorded with actions relative to the initial selected cell.

For instance, if you record a macro in cell A1 which moves the cursor to A3 with this option turned on, running the resulting macro in cell J6 would move the cursor to J8.

If this option was turned off when the macro was recorded, running it in cell J6 would move the cursor to A3.

alt_id:Record Macro...|MenuItem|[Unnamed.name: Record Macro...
alt_id:Record Macro...|MenuItem|[Unnamed.full_description:
Record a macro.

Each of the commands you perform will be saved into the macro so that you can play them back again.
